articles.title: TronDAO to initiate a 3 billion withdrawal to guard TRX’s value
articles.description: TronDAO announced it would be withdrawing another 3 billion TRX from a CeFi and DeFi lending platform.

articles.title: Elon Musk is Sued for “Ponzi” Scheme with Dogecoin
articles.description: Elon Musk is currently being sued by billionaire Investor Keith Johnson. Also in the firing line are Musk’s companies SpaceX and Tesla.

articles.title: ‘Dogefather’ Elon Musk Slapped With Mammoth $258 Billion Lawsuit For Allegedly Pumping Dogecoin
articles.description: The lawsuit, filed in Manhattan on Thursday, claims Elon Musk, electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla, and space exploration startup SpaceX are masterminds of a “Dogecoin Crypto Pyramid Scheme” which resulted in the plaintiff losing money.

articles.title: State securities regulators investigate Celsius over withdrawal suspension: Report
articles.description: Reports from different media outlets in the last week also suggested the Celsius Network has lost major backers and onboarded new attorneys amid a volatile crypto market.

articles.title: Brad Garlinghouse: Ripple is Hiring for Hundreds of Roles, But we Have a ‘No A**holes’ Policy
articles.description: Summary: Ripple CEO, Brad Garlinghouse, has announced that the company is currently hiring despite the ongoing crypto winter. Mr. Garlinghouse also cautioned that Ripple has a ‘No A**holes’ policy. Ripple will be conducting a recruitment event in Toronto, Canada, on June 23rd. Brad Garlinhouse, the CEO of the remittance-focused company of Ripple, has announced that the company is looking to hire...

articles.title: USDC Issuer Circle is launching Euro Coin (EUROC), a new Euro-backed stablecoin
articles.description: Circle, the issuer behind the USD Coin (USDC) stablecoin, will launch a new stablecoin that is backed by the Euro by the end of this month.

articles.title: TRON DAO Reserve to Withdraw Another 3 Billion TRX to Protect USDD Peg
articles.description: For the second consecutive day, the TRON DAO Reserve announces plans to withdraw substantial quantities of TRX from trading platforms.

articles.title: Cardano, Solana, Tron, And Dogecoin Chart Stunning Relief Rally After Biggest Rate Hike In 28 Years
articles.description: Cryptocurrencies swung from negative into positive territory even after U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell announced a 75 basis-point increase on its benchmark interest rate, the biggest since 1994.

articles.title: Tron DAO to withdraw another 3 billion TRX from exchanges
articles.description: Following this latest withdrawal, the DAO Reserve will have pulled 5.5 billion TRX from exchanges in two days, or nearly 6% of total supply.

articles.title: Kiss Singer Gene Simmons Claims He Hasn't Sold His Litecoin and 13 Other Crypto Holdings
articles.description: Gene Simmons says he continues to hold Litecoin and 13 other cryptocurrencies

articles.title: Ethereum sell-off resumes with ETH price risking another 25% decline in June
articles.description: Ether price is forming a bear pennant pattern whose profit target comes to be near $850.

articles.title: Solana, Tron and Dogecoin Post Double-Digit Gains Amid General Market Relief Rally
articles.description: SOL, TRX and DOGE have added 19%, 20.27% and 12.65% over past 24 hours

articles.title: Crypto markets rebound as Elrond gains 24% leading the top 100 pack
